  INVALID_PATH = 0, UNC_PATH, ABSOLUTE_DRIVE_PATH, RELATIVE_DRIVE_PATH,
  ABSOLUTE_PATH, RELATIVE_PATH, DEVICE_PATH, UNC_DOT_PATH
}
enum   _ATOM_INFORMATION_CLASS { AtomBasicInformation = 0, AtomTableInformation = 1 }
enum   _EVENT_TYPE { NotificationEvent, SynchronizationEvent }
enum   _EVENT_INFORMATION_CLASS { EventBasicInformation }
enum   _SEMAPHORE_INFORMATION_CLASS { SemaphoreBasicInformation }
enum   _SECTION_INFORMATION_CLASS { SectionBasicInformation, SectionImageInformation }
enum   _SHUTDOWN_ACTION { ShutdownNoReboot, ShutdownReboot, ShutdownPowerOff }
enum   _KPROFILE_SOURCE {
  ProfileTime, ProfileAlignmentFixup, ProfileTotalIssues, ProfilePipelineDry,
  ProfileLoadInstructions, ProfilePipelineFrozen, ProfileBranchInstructions, ProfileTotalNonissues,
  ProfileDcacheMisses, ProfileIcacheMisses, ProfileCacheMisses, ProfileBranchMispredictions,
  ProfileStoreInstructions, ProfileFpInstructions, ProfileIntegerInstructions, Profile2Issue,
  Profile3Issue, Profile4Issue, ProfileSpecialInstructions, ProfileTotalCycles,
  ProfileIcacheIssues, ProfileDcacheAccesses, ProfileMemoryBarrierCycles, ProfileLoadLinkedIssues,
  ProfileMaximum
}
enum   _PORT_INFORMATION_CLASS { PortNoInformation }
enum   _IO_COMPLETION_INFORMATION_CLASS { IoCompletionBasicInformation }
enum   _HARDERROR_RESPONSE_OPTION {
  OptionAbortRetryIgnore, OptionOk, OptionOkCancel, OptionRetryCancel,
  OptionYesNo, OptionYesNoCancel, OptionShutdownSystem
}
enum   _HARDERROR_RESPONSE {
  ResponseReturnToCaller, ResponseNotHandled, ResponseAbort, ResponseCancel,
  ResponseIgnore, ResponseNo, ResponseOk, ResponseRetry,
  ResponseYes
}
enum   _SYSDBG_COMMAND {
  SysDbgQueryModuleInformation, SysDbgQueryTraceInformation, SysDbgSetTracepoint, SysDbgSetSpecialCall,
  SysDbgClearSpecialCalls, SysDbgQuerySpecialCalls
}

00044    * Ask Ob to translate the port handle to EPORT

00082   if((Selector1 && !PspIsDescriptorValid(&LdtEntry1)) ||
00083      (Selector2 && !PspIsDescriptorValid(&LdtEntry2))) return STATUS_INVALID_LDT_DESCRIPTOR;
00084   if(!(Selector1 || Selector2)) return STATUS_SUCCESS;
00085 
00086   NewLdtSize += (Selector1 >= Selector2) ? Selector1 : Selector2;
00087 
00088   KeAcquireSpinLock(&LdtLock, &oldIrql);
00089 
00090   LdtDescriptor = (PUSHORT) &KeGetCurrentProcess()->LdtDescriptor;
00091   LdtBase = LdtDescriptor[1] |
00092                   ((LdtDescriptor[2] & 0xff) << 16) |
00093                   ((LdtDescriptor[3] & ~0xff) << 16);
00094   LdtLimit = LdtDescriptor[0] |
00095                    ((LdtDescriptor[3] & 0xf) << 16);
00096 
00097   if(LdtLimit < (NewLdtSize - 1))
00098   {
00099     /* allocate new ldt, copy old one there, set gdt ldt entry to new
00100        values and load ldtr register and free old ldt */
00101 
00102     ULONG NewLdtBase = (ULONG) ExAllocatePool(NonPagedPool,
00103                                               NewLdtSize);
00104 
00105     if(!NewLdtBase)
00106     {
00107       KeReleaseSpinLock(&LdtLock, oldIrql);
00108       return STATUS_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES;
00109     }
00110 
00111     if(LdtBase)
00112     {
00113       memcpy((PVOID) NewLdtBase, (PVOID) LdtBase, LdtLimit+1);
00114     }
00115 
00116     LdtDescriptor[0] = (USHORT)((--NewLdtSize) & 0xffff);
00117     LdtDescriptor[1] = (USHORT)(NewLdtBase & 0xffff);
00118     LdtDescriptor[2] = (USHORT)(((NewLdtBase & 0xff0000) >> 16) | 0x8200);
00119     LdtDescriptor[3] = (USHORT)(((NewLdtSize & 0xf0000) >> 16) |
00120                                 ((NewLdtBase & 0xff000000) >> 16));
00121 
00122     KeSetGdtSelector(LDT_SELECTOR,
00123                      ((PULONG) LdtDescriptor)[0],
00124                      ((PULONG) LdtDescriptor)[1]);
00125 
00126 #if defined(__GNUC__)
00127     __asm__("lldtw %%ax"
00128             : /* no output */
00129             : "a" (LDT_SELECTOR));
00130 #elif defined(_MSC_VER)
00131     __asm mov ax, LDT_SELECTOR
00132     __asm lldt ax
00133 #else
00134 #error Unknown compiler for inline assembler
00135 #endif
00136 
00137     if(LdtBase)
00138     {
00139       ExFreePool((PVOID) LdtBase);
00140     }
00141 
00142     LdtBase = NewLdtBase;
00143   }
00144 
00145   if(Selector1)
00146   {
00147     memcpy((char*)LdtBase + Selector1,
00148            &LdtEntry1,
00149            sizeof(LDT_ENTRY));
00150   }
00151 
00152   if(Selector2)
00153   {
00154     memcpy((char*)LdtBase + Selector2,
00155            &LdtEntry2,
00156            sizeof(LDT_ENTRY));
00157   }
00158 
00159   KeReleaseSpinLock(&LdtLock, oldIrql);
00160   return STATUS_SUCCESS;
00161 }

01277    /* Validate the parameters */
01278 
01279    if (!heapPtr)
01280       return FALSE;
01281    if (!ptr)  /* Freeing a NULL ptr is doesn't indicate an error in Win2k */
01282    {
01283       DPRINT("(%08x,%08lx,%p): asked to free NULL\n",
01284            heap, flags, ptr );
01285       return TRUE;
01286    }
01287 
01288    flags &= HEAP_NO_SERIALIZE;
01289    flags |= heapPtr->flags;
01290    if (!(flags & HEAP_NO_SERIALIZE))

01293    {
01294       if (!(flags & HEAP_NO_SERIALIZE))

01296       DPRINT("(%08x,%08lx,%p): returning FALSE\n",
01297             heap, flags, ptr );
01298       return FALSE;
01299    }
01300 
01301    /* Turn the block into a free block */
01302 
01303    pInUse  = (ARENA_INUSE *)ptr - 1;

01305    HEAP_MakeInUseBlockFree( subheap, pInUse, heapPtr->flags );
01306 
01307    if (!(flags & HEAP_NO_SERIALIZE))
01308       RtlLeaveHeapLock( &heapPtr->critSection );
01309 
01310    DPRINT("(%08x,%08lx,%p): returning TRUE\n",

00477    }

00481       RtlReleasePebLock();
00482    }
00483

00128   ULONG Result;

00131    * Instead of the algorithm stated above, we use the algorithm
00132    * below, which is totally equivalent (see the tests), but does
00133    * not use a division and therefore is faster.
00134    */
00135   Result = *Seed * 0xffffffed + 0x7fffffc3;
00136 
00137   if (Result == 0xffffffff || Result == 0x7ffffffe)
00138     {
00139       Result = (Result + 2) & MAXLONG;

00141   else if (Result == 0x7fffffff)
00142     {
00143       Result = 0;
00144     }

00146     {
00147       Result = Result + (~Result & 1);
00148     }
00149   else
00150     {
00151       Result = (Result + (Result & 1)) & MAXLONG;
00152     }
00153 
00154   *Seed = Result;
00155
